output.description: No stage directions detected in any AI prospect turns. All responses consist of natural spoken dialogue without asterisks, brackets, parentheticals describing actions/tone, or meta-descriptions of delivery.

Three stage directions detected in the prospect's turns. All use asterisk narration format describing physical actions and emotional states: leaning back in chair, pausing thoughtfully, and sighing. These are non-speech text elements that break immersion.

No stage directions detected. The text '[skeptically]' and '[slightly warmer]' appear to be tone markers in brackets, which are stage directions. These describe how lines are delivered rather than spoken dialogue.
No stage directions detected. The (INTERRUPTED) marker is a system-inserted technical notation, not a stage direction generated by the AI prospect. All other text consists of normal spoken dialogue.

No stage directions detected. The AI prospect used only spoken dialogue and natural conversational expressions ('Hmm...' and 'Ha' are spoken utterances, not stage directions). No asterisks, brackets, parenthetical actions, or meta-descriptions of tone/behavior were present.
